description: Implement the Decorator pattern in the 'MessageServiceApp' project by completing the 'LoggingMessageService' class in 'src/com/messaging/decorator/LoggingMessageService.java'. Implement all interface methods by delegating to the 'delegate' field. The 'sendMessage' method must print "[LOG] Sending message to: " + to and the 'getMessageCount' method must print "[LOG] Getting message count" before calling the delegate. Ensure the project compiles without errors.
